heading: Penalties
label: 3215 Penalties
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3215, , , , related to separability of provisions, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 89–136, title VII, § 70579 Stat. 573Pub. L. 105–393, § 102(b)(3)Aug. 26, 1965
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Feb. 11, 1999section 105 of Pub. L. 105–393section 3121 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3215, , , , related to separability of provisions, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 89–136, title VII, § 70579 Stat. 573Pub. L. 105–393, § 102(b)(3)Aug. 26, 1965

children.text: obtaining for the person or for any applicant any financial assistance under this chapter or any extension of the assistance by renewal, deferment, or action, or by any other means, or the acceptance, release, or substitution of security for the assistance;
influencing in any manner the action of the Secretary; or
obtaining money, property, or any thing of value, under this chapter;
embezzles, abstracts, purloins, or willfully misapplies any funds, securities, or other thing of value, that is pledged or otherwise entrusted to the person;

children.label: A
children.text: makes any false entry in any book, report, or statement of or to the Secretary; or

children.label: B
children.text: without being duly authorized, draws any order or issue, puts forth, or assigns any note, debenture, bond, or other obligation, or draft, bill of exchange, mortgage, judgment, or decree thereof;

with intent to defraud, participates or shares in or receives directly or indirectly any money, profit, property, or benefit through any transaction, loan, grant, commission, contract, or any other act of the Secretary; or

gives any unauthorized information concerning any future action or plan of the Secretary that might affect the value of securities, or having such knowledge invests or speculates, directly or indirectly, in the securities or property of any company or corporation receiving loans, grants, or other assistance from the Secretary;
